name: Rayonier Inc.
description: Rayonier Inc. is a leading timberland real estate investment trust (REIT) headquartered in Wildlight, Florida. The company owns and manages approximately 4.2 million acres of highly productive timberlands across the United States and New Zealand. Rayonier focuses on optimizing portfolio value through sustainable forest management, wood products manufacturing, real estate development, and land-based solutions. By managing its lands to their highest and best use, the company provides long-term value to its stakeholders while maintaining a strong commitment to environmental stewardship, corporate responsibility, and sustainable forestry practices across its diverse geographic footprint.
